overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city at dusk. The character traverses a commercial district with towering glass buildings, digital billboards, and palm trees, crossing a street at a yellow crosswalk before continuing along the opposite sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic commercial sidewalk with vertical neon strips and digital billboards

events.description: sunlight becomes visible between buildings as character moves forward, creating warm backlighting

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the neon-lit sidewalk beside tall commercial buildings with digital displays

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking past the character in the opposite direction

entered.detail: tall vertical digital screen displaying advertisements on building facade
cyan neon light strip running along the building wall at ground level
tall palm trees lining the sidewalk between pedestrian walkway and street
futuristic elevated monorail or walkway structure spanning across the street
tall modern building with reflective glass facade and neon accents

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a futuristic commercial sidewalk illuminated by cyan neon strips and large digital billboards. Palm trees line the path while elevated transit tracks span overhead. A pedestrian passes by in the opposite direction as warm sunlight begins to appear between the towering glass buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with yellow zebra crossing and distant mountain views

events.description: character steps off the sidewalk onto the yellow crosswalk to cross the wide street
black sedan passes by on the right while character is in the middle of crossing
character turns to look around while continuing to cross the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection on yellow-striped crosswalk, navigating around passing vehicles

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving through the intersection past the crossing character

entered.detail: broad yellow-striped pedestrian crossing with WAIT X markings painted on asphalt
large white geometric building facade on the opposite side of the street
distant mountain range visible beyond the city buildings in the background

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the enclosed sidewalk to the open intersection, crossing the yellow-striped crosswalk. A black sedan passes nearby as the character navigates the wide asphalt crossing. The scene opens up to reveal distant mountains and a large white building on the opposite side, with the elevated transit track still visible overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with neon storefronts and pedestrian activity

events.description: character steps onto the opposite sidewalk after completing the street crossing
character turns left to continue down the sidewalk, merging with pedestrian traffic

agents.ego_description: walking along the opposite sidewalk, passing groups of pedestrians and observing neon-lit storefronts

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking in the opposite direction along the sidewalk

entered.detail: glowing cyan and red neon signs above shop entrances on the right side
tall vertical digital advertisement screen showing animated content

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the street, the character walks along the opposite sidewalk where pedestrian density increases. Neon storefront signs glow on the right while digital billboards illuminate the left. The character navigates through moderate foot traffic, passing other pedestrians as the elevated transit track remains visible now to the left side of the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit commercial district that transitions from an enclosed sidewalk to an open city intersection and back into a crowded pedestrian walkway. It begins with the character walking along a path illuminated by cyan neon strips and digital billboards, passing under elevated transit tracks as warm sunlight filters between towering glass buildings. As the character leaves the sidewalk, the scene opens up into a wide intersection where they cross a yellow-striped crosswalk past a passing black sedan, revealing distant mountains and a large white building. The camera then follows the character onto the opposite sidewalk, where the environment shifts toward a denser urban atmosphere filled with glowing storefront signs and increased foot traffic. Finally, the movement continues past other pedestrians while the elevated transit track remains visible to the left of the frame.
